title: ericentrodea corazonensis var. cuatrecasasii
intro: Ericentrodea corazonensis var. cuatrecasasii is a variety of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Colombia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ericentrodea corazonensis var. cuatrecasasii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
